ariaflow

Healthy mDNS stale ·
Throughput
idle
Queue
Cap
headroom available
Cap
unset
no bandwidth limit configured
Details
Session -
Disk -
Advanced
Output filename
Override the filename aria2 saves to. Leave blank to derive from the URL.
Priority
Higher = dispatched first within the queue. Default 0.
Mirror URLs
Additional URLs aria2 can fall back to for the same file.
Torrent / Metalink file
Use a local file instead of a URL. Pasted URL is ignored when a file is selected.
Post-action rule
Override the post-action rule for this item only.
idle

Bandwidth

Probe → measured result, reservation policy, download concurrency

Probe

Probed -
overdue
Interface -
Source -
Last probe payload

Measured

↓ -
↑ -
RPM -

Capacity (from reserve)

↓ -
↑ -

Reserve

Downlink reserve
Reserve % or absolute Mbps of downlink. Stricter wins. Max 90% — at least 10% must remain usable.
Uplink reserve
Reserve % or absolute Mbps of uplink. Stricter wins. Max 90%.

Concurrency

Concurrent downloads
Max parallel downloads. Default: 1 (sequential).
Duplicate transfers
Action for duplicate active jobs on the same URL.

Healthy

Components

ariaflow-dashboard
· PID - installed - ?
Auto-update

Preflight

Readiness gates — pass, warnings, and failures

Options

Declaration preferences

Scheduler

Auto preflight
Run preflight gate checks automatically before starting the scheduler.
Post-action rule
pending
Placeholder policy used after a download finishes. Only one option is currently defined; this becomes a real selector once additional rules ship.

Retries

Max retries
Auto-retry failed items. 0 = manual only.
Retry backoff
Wait between dashboard-side retries.
aria2 max tries
Per-URL retry budget passed to aria2 itself. 0 = aria2 default.
aria2 retry wait
Wait between aria2's own retry attempts.

Distribute

Distribute downloads
Auto-create torrent from completed HTTP downloads.
Seed ratio
Max seed hours
Max active seeds
Tracker URL

aria2

aria2 unsafe mode
Allow setting any aria2 option via API. Bypasses the safe subset.

aria2 Options

Current aria2 global options.

Declaration

Raw declaration JSON

Contract

Activity

Backend + dashboard events, merged chronologically

version drift

Freshness Map

Per-endpoint refresh class declared by the backend (/api/_meta) and current router state.
Router not booted (legacy backend without /api/_meta, or not yet loaded).
